data.name: AppTagline
data.value: Your school. Your brand. Your success.

data.name: Benefits_Lead
data.value: A complete platform that brings together courses, homework, grades and messaging to help every student succeed.

data.name: Benefits_Security_Desc
data.value: Your data is protected and your privacy is guaranteed.

data.name: Classroom_NoCamera
data.value: No camera detected on this device.

data.name: Classroom_CameraDetected
data.value: Camera detected — click Camera to turn it on.

data.name: Classroom_BgNeedCamera
data.value: Turn on the camera to change the background.

data.name: CreateOffer_DescriptionPlaceholder
data.value: Describe your offer, objectives, teaching method and benefits for the student.

data.name: CreateOffer_PreviewNote
data.value: Review your offer details before publishing.

data.name: CreateOffer_Subtitle
data.value: Configure your offer in a few steps

data.name: Documents_Formats
data.value: PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Images — max 50 MB

data.name: Documents_Subtitle
data.value: Manage and share your teaching files

data.name: Empty_NoData_Description
data.value: Data will appear here once configured.

data.name: Error_ApiConnection
data.value: API connection error. Make sure the API server is running.

data.name: Error_CreateAccount
data.value: Unable to create account. Please try again.

data.name: Error_FillDateOfBirth
data.value: Please enter your date of birth.

data.name: Error_InvalidSubdomain
data.value: The subdomain may only contain letters, numbers, and hyphens.

data.name: Error_PasswordWeak
data.value: Password does not meet minimum requirements.

data.name: Error_SlugTaken
data.value: This address is already used by another school.

data.name: Faq_A1
data.value: Under five minutes! Sign up, customize your space, and invite your first students right away.

data.name: Faq_A2
data.value: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial on all plans, no credit card required.

data.name: Faq_A3
data.value: Absolutely. We use Stripe, PCI DSS certified, to process all payments securely.

data.name: Faq_A4
data.value: Yes, from the Professional plan, connect your custom domain for a 100% professional image.

data.name: Faq_A5
data.value: TutorSphere is available in French, English, Spanish, German, Portuguese, Mandarin, and Arabic.

data.name: Faq_Q1
data.value: How long does it take to create my school?

data.name: Faq_Q2
data.value: Can I try TutorSphere for free?

data.name: Faq_Q4
data.value: Can I use my own domain name?

data.name: Feature_Messaging_Desc
data.value: Integrated messaging with parents and students in real time.

data.name: Feature_Offers_Desc
data.value: Flexible subscriptions, secure payments and automated management.

data.name: Feature_Parents_Description
data.value: Enroll your children, track their progress, view reports, and manage payments.

data.name: Feature_Revenue_Desc
data.value: Detailed statistics, revenue tracking and automatic payouts.

data.name: Feature_Schedule_Desc
data.value: Smart calendar, automatic reminders and video conferencing.

data.name: Feature_Students_Description
data.value: Access your lessons, homework, documents, and messages in a simple, secure environment.

data.name: Feature_Students_Manage_Desc
data.value: Personalized tracking, progress reports and simplified communication.

data.name: Feature_Tutors_Description
data.value: Professional dashboard: students, calendar, subscriptions, billing, progress reports.

data.name: Features_Subtitle
data.value: A complete suite of tools designed for modern tutors.

data.name: FinalCta_Subtitle
data.value: Join tutors who chose TutorSphere to professionalize their school.

data.name: FinalCta_Title
data.value: Ready for a better learning experience?

data.name: Hero_Badge
data.value: The all-in-one platform for stress-free learning

data.name: Hero_Headline
data.value: Grow your tutoring business with the all-in-one software built for education professionals.

data.name: Hero_Headline_Line1
data.value: Grow your tutoring business with the all-in-one software built for education professionals.

data.name: Hero_Lead
data.value: TutorSphere supports students and parents through a structured, motivating school journey — so learning feels calm and clear every day.

data.name: Hero_Mockup_Alt
data.value: TutorSphere dashboard on laptop and mobile

data.name: Highlight_Classroom_Desc
data.value: Join your students directly from TutorSphere with a smooth, professional experience.

data.name: Highlight_Payments_Desc
data.value: Stripe, Apple Pay, and Google Pay — secure payments for you and families.

data.name: Homework_Subtitle
data.value: Create, manage and grade your students' homework

data.name: Integrations_Subtitle
data.value: Sync calendars, payments, and video conferencing with ease.

data.name: Landing_Feature_Classroom_Desc
data.value: Video conferencing, whiteboard, and screen sharing without leaving the platform.

data.name: Landing_Feature_Courses_Desc
data.value: Access your courses and learning resources

data.name: Login_Admin_WrongRole
data.value: This account does not have administrator rights.

data.name: Login_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Access your dashboard to manage your lessons, students, and subscriptions.

data.name: Login_InvalidCredentials
data.value: Invalid credentials. Please check your email and password.

data.name: Login_Parent_Subtitle
data.value: Sign in to follow your children

data.name: Login_Parent_WrongRole
data.value: This account is not a parent account. Please use the correct login page.

data.name: Login_Student_Subtitle
data.value: Sign in to access your courses

data.name: Login_Student_WrongRole
data.value: This account is not a student account. Please use the correct login page.

data.name: Login_Tutor_Desc
data.value: Manage your courses, students and sessions

data.name: Login_Tutor_Subtitle
data.value: Sign in to manage your students and sessions

data.name: Login_Tutor_WrongRole
data.value: This account is not a tutor account. Please use the correct login page.

data.name: Mobile_Desc
data.value: Parents, students, and tutors access lessons, homework, and messages on iOS and Android.

data.name: Offers_DaysHint
data.value: Check the days and set a start time for each slot.

data.name: Offers_DaysRequiredError
data.value: Select at least one day and lesson time.

data.name: Offers_MaxCapacityHint
data.value: Maximum number of students who can subscribe to this offer.

data.name: Offers_Subtitle
data.value: Manage your packages, rates and schedules

data.name: Parent_LastReportText
data.value: Great session — remarkable progress in algebra.

data.name: Parent_MyChildren_Description
data.value: Manage your children's profiles and enrollments.

data.name: Parent_Subscriptions_Description
data.value: View and manage your active subscriptions.

data.name: Parent_Subtitle
data.value: Enroll your children and track their progress.

data.name: ParentDashboard_AIAssistantDefault
data.value: Add your children to receive a personalized weekly progress summary.

data.name: ParentDashboard_AIAssistantMulti
data.value: This week, {0} maintains an average of {2} and {1} reaches {3}. Two sessions are scheduled this week.

data.name: ParentDashboard_AIAssistantOneChild
data.value: This week, {0} is making good progress. Check reports for details.

data.name: ParentDashboard_Subtitle
data.value: Here's an overview of your children's progress.

data.name: ParentRegister_Subtitle
data.value: Follow your children's progress with ease

data.name: Parents_Empty
data.value: No parents registered. Add your first parent contact.

data.name: Parents_RequiredName
data.value: First and last name are required.

data.name: ParentSubs_BannerCanceled
data.value: Payment cancelled. You can try again anytime.

data.name: ParentSubs_BannerSaved
data.value: Subscription saved. You can track its status below.

data.name: Platform_Title
data.value: A complete platform designed for you

data.name: Pricing_Faq1_A
data.value: Yes. You can cancel from your account settings. Access remains active until the end of the paid period.

data.name: Pricing_Faq1_Q
data.value: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?

data.name: Pricing_Faq2_A
data.value: After 14 days, your card is charged automatically for the chosen plan. No fees during the trial.

data.name: Pricing_Faq2_Q
data.value: What happens after the free trial?

data.name: Pricing_Faq3_A
data.value: Professional suits most independent teachers. Upgrade to Business if you manage multiple teachers, or contact us for Enterprise.

data.name: Pricing_Faq4_A
data.value: Yes. All payments are processed by Stripe. We never store your banking details.

data.name: Pricing_SubscribeError
data.value: To subscribe, please contact support or create a student subscription under Subscriptions, then proceed to payment.

data.name: Profile_NoCerts
data.value: No certifications yet. Click “Add” to create one.

data.name: Profile_NoDiplomas
data.value: No degrees yet. Click “Add” to create one.

data.name: Profile_Subtitle
data.value: Present yourself to parents and students

data.name: PublicProfile_AboutText
data.value: Passionate about teaching for over 8 years, I help students succeed with methods tailored to each learning profile.

data.name: PublicProfile_ComingSoonDesc
data.value: This section will be available soon.

data.name: Register_Benefit1_Description
data.value: A public space branded to you with your offers and profile.

data.name: Register_Benefit2_Description
data.value: Students, calendar, homework, reports, and payments in one place.

data.name: Register_Benefit3_Description
data.value: Subscriptions, automatic billing, and financial dashboard.

data.name: Register_Benefits_Subtitle
data.value: Create your digital school in minutes.

data.name: Register_Confirm_Hint
data.value: You can already log in; confirming your email unlocks all features.

data.name: Register_Confirm_Message
data.value: We sent a confirmation link to {0}. Click it to activate your account.

data.name: Register_Parent_Benefit1_Desc
data.value: View grades, reports and attendance in real time.

data.name: Register_Parent_Benefit2_Desc
data.value: View upcoming lessons and past sessions.

data.name: Register_Parent_Benefit3_Desc
data.value: Chat directly with your child's tutor.

data.name: Register_Parent_Benefits_Subtitle
data.value: Stay informed and involved in their academic journey.

data.name: Register_SecurityNote
data.value: Secure connection — your data is protected

data.name: Register_Student_Autonomous
data.value: You are 14 or older — your account is independent.

data.name: Register_Student_Benefit2_Desc
data.value: View and submit your assignments easily.

data.name: Register_Student_Benefit3_Desc
data.value: Interactive whiteboard, document sharing and chat.

data.name: Register_Student_Benefits_Subtitle
data.value: Access your courses, homework and learning resources.

data.name: School_DnsHint
data.value: Configure a CNAME to tutorsphere.com in your DNS registrar.

data.name: School_DropFiles
data.value: Drop files here or click to upload

data.name: School_MediaHint
data.value: Manage your school's photo, video and certificate gallery.

data.name: School_NoOfferings
data.value: No offerings available at this time.

data.name: School_Subtitle
data.value: Your school's identity and online presence

data.name: Search_Error_Load
data.value: Unable to load results. Make sure the TutorSphere API is running.

data.name: Search_Subtitle
data.value: Browse active schools with public profiles on TutorSphere.

data.name: SessionReport_HomeworkText
data.value: Exercises 5 to 12, page 84. Due before the next session.

data.name: Settings_CalendarSubscribeInfo
data.value: Subscribe to your TutorSphere calendar from Google Calendar, Outlook, Apple Calendar, or any ICS / webcal compatible app.

data.name: Settings_LessonReminderDesc
data.value: Receive an email before each scheduled session.

data.name: Settings_RemindersInfo
data.value: Lesson reminders are sent via Mail Sender about 24 hours before the session (teacher, student, and parent based on enrollments).

data.name: Showcase_Calendar_Desc
data.value: Smart calendar with automatic reminders and external sync.

data.name: Showcase_Classroom_Desc
data.value: HD video, interactive whiteboard, and attendance tracking built in.

data.name: Showcase_Crm_Desc
data.value: Sales pipeline, trial tracking, and automated follow-ups.

data.name: Showcase_Dashboard_Desc
data.value: Revenue, active students, upcoming lessons, and key metrics on one unified dashboard.

data.name: Showcase_Dashboard_Title
data.value: Run your business at a glance

data.name: Showcase_Invoices_Desc
data.value: Automatic invoices, receipts, and accounting export.

data.name: Showcase_Payments_Desc
data.value: Secure payments, recurring subscriptions, and payment tracking.

data.name: Showcase_Reports_Desc
data.value: Detailed progress reports, exportable and shareable in one click.

data.name: Showcase_Students_Desc
data.value: Student profiles, history, grades, and centralized communication.

data.name: Showcase_Subscriptions_Desc
data.value: Create monthly, quarterly, or pay-as-you-go offers.

data.name: Showcase_Subtitle
data.value: Explore the tools that transform your tutoring business.

data.name: Showcase_Title
data.value: A complete platform, module by module

data.name: Sidebar_Upgrade_Text
data.value: Unlock more features and grow your school.

data.name: Skeleton_ComingSoon
data.value: This feature will be available soon.

data.name: Steps_1_Desc
data.value: Sign up for free and set up your school in minutes.

data.name: Steps_2_Desc
data.value: Add your logo, offers, pricing, and invite your first students.

data.name: Steps_3_Desc
data.value: Schedule, collect payments, and track progress from your dashboard.

data.name: Steps_Subtitle
data.value: From signup to first lesson, TutorSphere guides you.

data.name: Steps_Title
data.value: Launch your school in three steps

data.name: StudentRegister_Subtitle
data.value: Access your courses, homework and reports

data.name: Students_Empty
data.value: No students found. Add your first student.

data.name: Testimonial_Parent_Quote
data.value: I follow my son's results in real time and communicate easily with his teachers. Finally a clear solution!

data.name: Testimonial_Student_Quote
data.value: TutorSphere helps me track my courses and homework without stress. I see my progress and always know what to do.

data.name: Testimonial_Teacher_Quote
data.value: I share resources, grade homework and communicate with students in one place. A real time saver.

data.name: Testimonial_Tutor_Quote
data.value: TutorSphere transformed my practice. I manage 30 students, payments, and my calendar stress-free. My revenue grew 40% in six months.

data.name: Tutor_PricingDesc
data.value: Access all features to manage your courses, students and revenue.

data.name: Tutor_PricingTrial
data.value: 14-day free trial on the plan you choose (from $14.99 / month). Cancel anytime.

data.name: TutorDashboard_RevenueHint
data.value: Monthly revenue is shown above from your school's data.

data.name: TutorDashboard_Subtitle_Welcome
data.value: Welcome, {0}! Here is an overview of your activity today.

data.name: TutorRegister_Subtitle
data.value: Set up your professional space in a few steps.

data.name: Video_Placeholder
data.value: Demo video coming soon. In the meantime, create your school for free!

data.name: Video_Subtitle
data.value: See how simple TutorSphere is in video.

data.name: Video_Title
data.value: How to create your school in under five minutes

data.name: Why_Card1_Desc
data.value: Custom website, your own domain, and a professional image that sets you apart.

data.name: Why_Card2_Desc
data.value: Students, calendar, payments, homework, and reports — without juggling ten tools.

data.name: Why_Card3_Desc
data.value: Subscriptions, automated billing, and analytics to drive growth.

data.name: Why_Subtitle
data.value: Centralize your business, brand, and family relationships on one tool.

data.name: Why_Title
data.value: The platform built for tutoring professionals

data.name: ParentSubs_BannerPaid
data.value: Payment confirmed. Your subscription is active.

data.name: LandingPricing_Title
data.value: Choose the plan that grows with your tutoring business

data.name: LandingPricing_Subtitle
data.value: Clear plans for independent tutors and schools — no surprises.

data.name: LandingPricing_Footnote
data.value: 14-day free trial on paid plans. Cancel anytime. Secure payments via Stripe.

data.name: LandingPricing_Free_Desc
data.value: To get started and explore the platform.

data.name: LandingPricing_Pro_Desc
data.value: Grow with online payments and CRM tools.

data.name: Children_LoginAccess_CodeOnce
data.value: This code is shown once. Regenerate it if lost.

data.name: Children_LoginAccess_Help
data.value: Without an email, the child signs in with your parent email and a code you generate here.

data.name: Login_Student_CodeHelp
data.value: Ask your parent for the code generated in “My children”.

data.name: TutorSubs_NoSubscribers
data.value: No subscribers yet. Parent enrollments will appear here.

data.name: Lessons_AttendanceHelp
data.value: Student absent: if not cancelled 24h before, the session still counts as validated.

data.name: Lessons_CancelConfirm
data.value: Cancel this lesson? If less than 24h before start, it will still count.

data.name: Lessons_NoStudents
data.value: No students linked to this lesson.

data.name: Lessons_TutorNoShowConfirm
data.value: Confirm tutor absence? The session will not count; you must reschedule or refund.

data.name: Lessons_DateLocked24h
data.value: Date/time locked: cannot change within 24h of the lesson (or if already closed).
